home.subtitle: We connect quality, create value, measure and promote the effects of ecosystem stakeholders on the international stage. We encourage systemic and complementary thinking to raise quality and accessibility.
home.esgDescription: ESG stands for three pillars of sustainable development: Environmental, Social, and Governance. It is not compliance or a report - it is a way of thinking about business that generates value for all stakeholders.
home.environmentDesc: Climate, resources, renewable energy, carbon footprint
home.whySImpact: Why do we focus on S-Impact?
home.sImpactDesc: In our ecosystem, S is not an add-on - it is the heart of the entire system. S-Impact means measurable, documented social impact.
home.sImpactBullet1: We support neurodiversity, women in business, and innovators excluded by the system
home.sImpactBullet2: We build intergenerational bridges - children and grandparents learn together
home.sImpactBullet3: Every social action is tokenized - immutably recorded and verifiable
home.sImpactBullet4: We promote the Polish brand internationally through ethical business
home.successQuote: At Constellation.love, we do not measure success by position, status, or results alone. Equal does not mean fair.
home.workshopsTitle: We will lead entrepreneurship workshops for your team
home.schoolTitle: Let us develop entrepreneurship in Polish schools together
home.schoolCta: Write to me - I will share the program

hero.description: Irrefutable digital proof of invention existence at the pre-patent stage. A shield that works before theft - not after.
hero.elevatorPitch: - a self-sufficient ecosystem where the investor is also the client, and complementary projects exchange value without intermediaries.

innovations.title: Innovations
innovations.subtitle: SQLaminate quantum composite, piezoelectric courts and energy hybrid — technologies connecting sport, architecture and sustainable energy.
innovations.quantumDesc1: SQLaminate is a proprietary quantum composite developed within the Constellation ecosystem. It combines the structural properties of laminate with a photovoltaic layer based on Quantum Dots, creating a building material that simultaneously generates energy from diffused light.
innovations.quantumDesc2: In BIPV (Building-Integrated Photovoltaics) technology, SQLaminate replaces traditional solar panels — becoming an integral part of the facade, roof or building envelope. The building doesn't 'carry' panels — it IS the panel.
innovations.quantumFeature1: Generates energy from diffused light (no full sun exposure required)
innovations.quantumFeature2: Ultra-light and flexible — ideal for complex architectural forms
innovations.quantumFeature3: UV/IR protection with simultaneous energy production
innovations.quantumFeature4: Scalable — from yachts to office buildings and space infrastructure
innovations.piezoSubtitle: The world's first squash court enclosed in a capsule, generating energy from every player movement — three renewable energy sources in one sports facility.
innovations.piezo1Desc: The court floor converts kinetic energy from player steps and ball impacts into electricity. It simultaneously maps player activity for advanced sports analytics.
innovations.piezo2Desc: The glass shell made of quantum composite generates energy from diffused light, protects against UV/IR and serves as an ultra-light, durable construction material.
innovations.piezo3Desc: A flexible thermoelectric cell based on graphene produces energy from temperature differences. Integrated with ventilation, it recovers the court's thermal energy.
innovations.energyNote: All energy generated by the court is stored in a dedicated technical room and can be distributed to the building network or city energy grid. Project supported by an R&D grant of PLN 260,000 from PARP — ready for implementation.
innovations.ctaSubtitle: We are looking for partners and investors for technology co-ownership, licensing or tokenization model.
innovations.pubSubtitle: Selected articles and scientific publications by our team.

faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.subtitle: Answers to key questions from investors and partners about the AI Venture Integrator ecosystem.
faq.cat1q1: What exactly is AI Venture Anticrisis Integrator?
faq.cat1a1: It is a self-sufficient ecosystem of complementary technology projects, operating on the principle of Maslow's pyramid for business. Each project complements the others, creating a crisis-resistant network where value is exchanged directly — without unnecessary intermediaries.
faq.cat1q2: What does "dual use" mean — the investor is also the client?
faq.cat1a2: In our model, the investor not only finances the project but uses its products and services. This eliminates the classic "chicken & egg" problem in startups and radically reduces risk for both sides. The investor sees value from day one.
faq.cat1q3: How does barter exchange work within the ecosystem?
faq.cat1a3: Projects are complementary enough to exchange services, resources and value directly — e.g. InventorProof protects the IP of a startup from AI Studio, which in turn provides technology for BarterChain. This reduces transaction costs to near zero.
faq.cat1q4: Why an ecosystem instead of a single startup?
faq.cat1a4: A single startup is fragile — it depends on one market, one product, one team. An ecosystem of complementary projects creates a synergy effect: the failure of one element doesn't destroy the whole, and the success of one drives the others.
faq.cat2q1: What is the ecosystem's revenue model?
faq.cat2a1: The ecosystem generates revenue through multiple channels: technology licenses (InventorProof, MindMark™), consulting and audit services (ESG, company registration), ERP integrations (COMARCH), and transaction fees in BarterChain. Source diversification is key to resilience.
faq.cat2q2: What stage of development is the project at?
faq.cat2a2: The ecosystem is operational — it has patronage from MRiT (Ministry of Development and Technology), partnership with COMARCH, a working InventorProof.com platform, and a team with 20+ years of experience in grant acquisition and startup building.
faq.cat2q3: Does the ecosystem obtain EU grants?
faq.cat2a3: Yes. Our team are pioneers in acquiring EU and structural funds in Poland — with over 20 years of experience. Grants are one source of funding, but the model is designed not to depend on them.
faq.cat2q4: How do you minimize investment risk?
faq.cat2a4: On three levels: (1) dual use — the investor uses products from day one, (2) complementarity — diversification within the ecosystem, (3) InventorProof — pre-patent IP protection prevents technology theft before commercialization.
faq.cat3a1: MindMark™ is our intellectual property protection service at the pre-patent stage. It uses blockchain infrastructure (distributed digital ledger) with 256-bit cryptography and timestamps to create irrefutable proof of authorship — before the idea reaches any institution.
faq.cat3q2: How does InventorProof differ from a patent?
faq.cat3a2: A patent protects after disclosure — InventorProof protects before disclosure. We fill the "pre-patent gap": the period when an inventor must share ideas with institutions (labs, investors, partners) but has no formal protection yet.
faq.cat3q3: What is COMARCH's role in the ecosystem?
faq.cat3a3: COMARCH as patron implements ecosystem innovations as modules for its ERP XL system. This guarantees scalability and access to thousands of enterprises using COMARCH solutions.
faq.cat4a1: A deep-tech innovator, intrapreneur, inventor of the quantum BIPV composite, founder of Konstelacja.org. Winner of the Micro-Entrepreneur of the Year award (Kronenberg Foundation / Citi Handlowy Bank) and featured in Forbes magazine. Author of Maslow's pyramid concept for the business ecosystem.
faq.cat4q2: Why do you focus on neurodiversity?
faq.cat4a2: Because the greatest breakthroughs come from minds that see the world differently. Our ecosystem is designed to adapt support to the mind — not the mind to the system. "Equal" does not mean "fair".
faq.cat4q3: Does the project operate under institutional patronage?
faq.cat4a3: Yes — the ecosystem has patronage from MRiT (Ministry of Development and Technology), partnership with COMARCH, collaboration with Semiconductor.no AS, and operates under the umbrella of Konstelacja.org Foundation (KRS, NIP, REGON — full transparency).
faq.noAnswerDesc: Contact us directly — we're happy to answer any question.

ecosystem.title: AI Venture Anticrisis
ecosystem.subtitle: A self-sufficient ecosystem of complementary ventures. Each project complements the others — to the extent that direct barter exchange of value, services and resources between them is possible.
ecosystem.supportDesc1: We support startup founders and their potential investors — minimizing the risk of project failure.
ecosystem.supportDesc2: This win-win for both sides is also our success — as intermediary and innovation broker.
ecosystem.supportDesc3: We are practitioners of incubation and innovative business models. We take care of VALUE and ensure benefits — from the individual to the overarching goal.
ecosystem.audioLabel: Statement by expert Ada Margo Marglewska
ecosystem.audioSub: MRiT — expert summit, meeting of practitioners with decision-makers
ecosystem.genBridgeDesc: GenBridge builds intergenerational communication with us — we connect the experience of older generations with the energy and innovation of the young.
ecosystem.taxSupport: You can donate 1.5% of your tax to support the innovation ecosystem. Every zloty supports Polish innovators and builds the Made in Poland brand.
ecosystem.directSupport: You can also support us directly through crowdfunding — every contribution matters.
ecosystem.comarchDesc: Our ecosystem modules are implemented in collaboration with Comarch — an IT solutions and ERP systems leader. Comarch provides technological and implementation infrastructure for ecosystem tools.
ecosystem.mritDesc: Our projects for economic growth are supported by the patronage of the Ministry of Development and Technology — confirmation that the AI Venture Integrator ecosystem aligns with the strategy for developing innovation and competitiveness of the Polish economy.
ecosystem.barterDesc1: Projects are complementary enough that value exchange happens directly — without unnecessary intermediaries and transaction costs.
ecosystem.barterDesc2: It's a self-sufficient economic organism resistant to crises — like Maslow's pyramid: we satisfy all needs for functioning.
ecosystem.qualityFilter: Foundations that passed our quality filter
ecosystem.qualityFilterDesc: We collaborate exclusively with organizations that meet our rigorous quality and transparency criteria. The foundations below have been verified and work for social well-being — together we build a better support ecosystem.
ecosystem.linksComingSoon: Links to individual foundations will be added.
ecosystem.moreArticles: More articles, interviews and press materials — coming soon.
ecosystem.domainsDesc: By purchasing a domain from our list, you support the Konstelacja.org Foundation and gain more than an address — you gain help in developing a business based on that domain. Have a domain? We'll help you create an idea and execute it.
ecosystem.nftNote: Each domain has collectible value as an NFT — a digital certificate of ownership recorded on blockchain.
ecosystem.domainsListNote: Full domain list and prices will be added. Purchase = foundation support + business building assistance.
ecosystem.referencesPlaceholder: Section in preparation — partner, client and expert opinions coming soon.
ecosystem.webinarsPlaceholder: Section in preparation — recordings and registrations for upcoming webinars coming soon.
ecosystem.missionQuote: "We create value, quality for economic growth. We change the definition of success. We create measurable result indicators."
ecosystem.missionDesc: We promote the Made in Poland · Polish Quality brand — on the international stage. We encourage systemic and complementary thinking to raise quality and accessibility.
